author: anon-581fd578
content:
Both bugs fixed, 381 tests passing, zero warnings:

1. navigate() panic: Added run_in_scope() to vitreous_reactive that temporarily pushes an existing scope onto the scope_stack. Event handlers (mouse, keyboard, scroll) now execute inside the root scope so use_context works for navigate(), use_route(), etc.

2. Text rendering: After glyph rasterization, glyph instance size and position are now patched with actual bitmap metrics:
   - size uses real bitmap dimensions / scale_factor (not advance_width x font_size)
   - pos offset by glyph bearing (left, -top) / scale_factor for correct baseline alignment
   - GlyphBearing struct added to atlas with parallel cache for bearing info
   - Both fresh rasterization and cache-hit paths apply the correction
